info.title: Pictory AI API
info.description: API documentation for the Pictory AI backend.

post.summary: Generate AI captions from a product image
post.description: Generates four marketing captions for a product image using the caption generation tool.

description.example: A premium floral fragrance for daily wear

get.description: Returns the current subscription plan details relevant to the caption generation tool.
Returns all caption generation history entries for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes one caption generation group and its related captions for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns image generation, enhancement, and themed image history for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes an image history group by type and request ID for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: History type: enhance, theme, or generate

post.summary: Edit a product image using AI
post.description: Uploads a product image and applies AI-powered editing including background replacement, lighting, style, text overlay, and camera angle adjustments. Free plan users are limited to 3 generations per month.

image.description: Product image file. Accepted formats: jpg, jpeg, png, webp. Max size: 20MB.

target_audience.description: The intended audience for the product.

product_description.description: Optional short description of the product.
product_description.example: A premium oud-based perfume with a gold cap.

background_type.example: Soft white marble surface with rose petals

background_blur.description: Background blur intensity from 0 (no blur) to 10 (maximum blur).

text_on_image.description: Optional text to overlay on the image.

text_position.description: Position of the text overlay on the image.

text_size.description: Font size of the overlay text in pixels.

extra_prompt.description: Additional instructions or creative directions for the AI.
extra_prompt.example: Add a subtle golden shimmer to the background.

num_images.description: Number of image variations to generate (1–3). Defaults to 1.

prompt_used.example: Professional luxury e-commerce product photography of Luxury Perfume Bottle...

403.description: Free plan monthly limit reached (max 3 generations).

message.example: You have reached the maximum limit of 3 generations for the free plan.

502.description: fal.ai returned an error or timed out.

message.example: Failed to submit request to fal.ai

post.summary: Generate an AI image based on project details
post.description:
Generates a professional AI image using **fal.ai** (Flux model) based on project name, content, color, and image type.

### Plan Limits
- **Free plan**: maximum **3 generations** total.
- **Pro plan**: **unlimited** generations (active subscription required).

Returns base64 image data along with metadata.

projectName.description: The name of the project to display in the image

content.description: Additional content description for image generation
content.example: A modern coffee shop with warm lighting

color.description: Brand color to dominate the image palette (hex or color name)

colorText.description: Additional color instructions in natural language

image.description: Base64 encoded image with data URI prefix

prompt.description: The full prompt sent to the AI

usage.description: Usage info (only returned for free plan)

403.description: Free limit reached or subscription expired

message.example: You have used all 3 free generations.
The project name field is required.

get.summary: Get usage notifications and limits for the authenticated user

200.description: Usage counters and limits returned successfully

isPro.description: Whether the user has a Pro subscription

post.summary: Apply a seasonal or occasion theme to a product image
post.description: Uploads a product image and replaces its background with a fully themed luxury marketing scene (e.g. Ramadan, Christmas, Valentine's Day). The product identity is preserved while the environment is completely transformed. Free plan users are limited to 3 generations per month.

image.description: Product image file. Accepted formats: jpg, jpeg, png, webp. Max size: 20MB.

theme.description: The occasion or seasonal theme to apply to the image.

optional_text.description: Optional text to overlay on the generated image (e.g. a promotional message or greeting). Displayed in a large bold luxury font at the top.

prompt_used.example: PRODUCT: The reference product may be a low-quality...

403.description: Free plan monthly limit reached (max 3 generations).

message.example: You have reached the maximum limit of 3 generations for the free plan.

image_size: The selected image size is invalid.

502.description: fal.ai returned an error, timed out, or returned no images.

message.example: Failed to submit request to fal.ai

get.summary: Get usage notifications and limits for the authenticated user

200.description: Usage counters and limits returned successfully

isPro.description: Whether the user has a Pro subscription

image.description: Product image file. Accepted formats: jpg, jpeg, png, webp. Max size: 20MB.

theme.description: The occasion or seasonal theme to apply to the image.

optional_text.description: Optional text to overlay on the generated image (e.g. a promotional message or greeting). Displayed in a large bold luxury font at the top.

prompt_used.example: PRODUCT: The reference product may be a low-quality...

message.example: You have reached the maximum limit of 3 generations for the free plan.

image_size: The selected image size is invalid.

message.example: Failed to submit request to fal.ai

sanctumBearerAuth.description: Use a Sanctum bearer token in the Authorization header.
